scripts.build: export PYTHONPATH=$(pwd) && npm run tw:build && observable build
scripts.dev: export PYTHONPATH=$(pwd) && npm run tw:build && concurrently "npm run tw:dev" "observable preview"
scripts.deploy: export PYTHONPATH=$(pwd) && npm run tw:build && observable deploy
scripts.preinstall: pip install uv --upgrade && pip uninstall opencv-python
